title: Natten tänder ljus på himlen

infobox.value: [Lasse Andersson](/wiki/Lasse_Andersson "Lasse Andersson"), [Cecilia von Melen](/w/index.php?title=Cecilia_von_Melen&action=edit&redlink=1 "Cecilia von Melen (page does not exist)")

is a [Christmas song](/wiki/Christmas_music "Christmas music") written by [Lasse Andersson](/wiki/Lasse_Andersson "Lasse Andersson") and [Cecilia von Melen](/w/index.php?title=Cecilia_von_Melen&action=edit&redlink=1 "Cecilia von Melen (page does not exist)"). Lyrical, the song depicts the many [stars](/wiki/Star "Star") seen at night at [Christmastimes](/wiki/Christmas "Christmas"). Several artists and groups have recorded the song.

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

1986 single by Carina Jaarnek

| "Natten tänder ljus på himlen" | |
| --- | --- |
| [Single](/wiki/Single_(music) "Single (music)") by [Carina Jaarnek](/wiki/Carina_Jaarnek "Carina Jaarnek") | |
| [A-side](/wiki/A-side_and_B-side "A-side and B-side") | "Natten tänder ljus på himlen" |
| [B-side](/wiki/A-side_and_B-side "A-side and B-side") | "Rör vid mig" ("Read My Lips") |
| Released | [1986](/wiki/1986_in_music "1986 in music") |
| [Genre](/wiki/Music_genre "Music genre") | [Christmas](/wiki/Christmas_music "Christmas music"), [schlager](/wiki/Schlager "Schlager") |
| [Label](/wiki/Record_label "Record label") | [Glendisc](/w/index.php?title=Glendisc&action=edit&redlink=1 "Glendisc (page does not exist)") |
| [Songwriters](/wiki/Songwriter "Songwriter") | [Lasse Andersson](/wiki/Lasse_Andersson "Lasse Andersson"), [Cecilia von Melen](/w/index.php?title=Cecilia_von_Melen&action=edit&redlink=1 "Cecilia von Melen (page does not exist)") |

**Natten tänder ljus på himlen** is a [Christmas song](/wiki/Christmas_music "Christmas music") written by [Lasse Andersson](/wiki/Lasse_Andersson "Lasse Andersson") and [Cecilia von Melen](/w/index.php?title=Cecilia_von_Melen&action=edit&redlink=1 "Cecilia von Melen (page does not exist)"). Lyrical, the song depicts the many [stars](/wiki/Star "Star") seen at night at [Christmastimes](/wiki/Christmas "Christmas"). Several artists and groups have recorded the song.

[Carina Jaarneks orkester](/wiki/Carina_Jaarneks_orkester "Carina Jaarneks orkester") recorded the song, and released it as a [single](/wiki/Single_(music) "Single (music)") in [1986](/wiki/1986_in_music "1986 in music").[[1]](#cite_note-1)

[Carina Jaarnek](/wiki/Carina_Jaarnek "Carina Jaarnek") also recorded the song with [Alfstarz](/wiki/Alfstarz "Alfstarz"), scoring a [Svensktoppen](/wiki/Svensktoppen "Svensktoppen") hit between 21 December 1986[[2]](#cite_note-2)-4 January [1987](/wiki/1987_in_music "1987 in music"),[[3]](#cite_note-Svensktoppen_-_1987-3) where it ended up at 8th respective 7th position.

[Jan Malmsjö](/wiki/Jan_Malmsj%C3%B6 "Jan Malmsjö") recorded the song on his 1987 Christmas album "[Låt mig få tända ett ljus](/w/index.php?title=L%C3%A5t_mig_f%C3%A5_t%C3%A4nda_ett_ljus_(musikalbum)&action=edit&redlink=1 "Låt mig få tända ett ljus (musikalbum) (page does not exist)")", scoring a Svensktoppen hit for seven weeks during the period 6 December 1987[[3]](#cite_note-Svensktoppen_-_1987-3)-10 January [1988](/wiki/1988_in_music "1988 in music"),[[4]](#cite_note-4) peaking at 7th position.

[Christer Sjögren](/wiki/Christer_Sj%C3%B6gren "Christer Sjögren") recorded the song on his [2000](/wiki/2000_in_music "2000 in music") Christmas album "[Ett julkort från förr](/wiki/Ett_julkort_fr%C3%A5n_f%C3%B6rr "Ett julkort från förr")".[[5]](#cite_note-5)
